Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We are blessed for the opportunity to follow along the guys from Trinity Oaks for Bucks for the Brave. The men and women that served in our armed services and as first responders, had jobs that required the, to be willing to sacrifice their own lives every day, in order to protect or save someone else's. Not many of us can say that, nor understand what that truly means. The things they've had to see, and the sacrifices they've made in their daily lives, can have a profound impact on them. Trinity Oaks' Bucks for the Brave platform allows the loved ones and communities that support these heroes to share their stories and unite us all in honoring and recognizing their service to our great nation. We are proud to continue to be a part of this incredible program, getting these heroes in the outdoors for the hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: Blue World Ep505: Mayan Underworld - Yucatan, Mexico
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Mexico’s Yucatan, Blue World explores remote cenotes in the jungle that were once used for Mayan rituals. Just reaching the surface of the water requires rappelling down from the forest above. But then, beneath the surface, we encounter strange alien life forms that live in total darkness, and the remains of humans and animal sacrifices from an ancient culture.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day begins with a powerful dose of perspective as contestants hear real-life breaching stories from American heroes—reminders of the stakes they’re preparing for. The team is then introduced to a concealed firearm headrest safe designed for rapid-response vehicle defense. Next, it’s straight into the action with a preliminary course of fire using GreenLight sights, where top performers are pushed even further with a bonus round to test speed, accuracy, and composure under pressure. The intensity ramps up during a sentry scenario featuring SABRE CO₂ non-lethal cartridges, putting their stealth and judgment to the test. But just as the dust begins to settle, a new CIA briefing drops—and it’s the most dire yet. With mission reality closing in fast, the contestants close the day with a crash course in S.E.R.E. (Survival, Evasion, Resistance, and Escape) training, rounding out their classroom combat readiness with hard-earned grit.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The challenges have only gotten started. In episode two, the teams must go beyond their limits to come out on top. From the brutal Blah line to building their own shelters with only a small ax, it’s a battle for scoring points and survival that’ll test these elite competitors like never before.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mike Glover, Green Beret and retired CIA operative, joins Don to kick it up a notch for our contestants. What would Surviving Mann be without some log PT? If it’s good enough for the Seals - it’s good enough for our contestants. If that wasn’t hard enough, Don and Mike have the contestants do some tire pulling, a run, tug of war, land nav and a Tyrolean traverse over alligator infested water. Oh, and did we mention the 40mph wind and rain storm?

The stunning spectrum of the landscape ranges from dark reds to bright yellows, splashed across the mountains in exuberant splendor. A soothing acoustic soundtrack accompanies the scenery, filmed from above and within the autumn paradise of the Wasatch mountains. Run time approx. 1 hour 50 minutes.

programme.title: Arches&canyonlands trailer
programme.desc: 24/7 nature relaxation channel featuring cinematic scenes of the world’s most beautiful places. Perfect for stress relief, sleep, or peaceful background viewing.

programme.title: Morning at the Marsh
programme.desc: Start your day in the quiet company of nature. Watch the world wake up through the reeds of a coastal marsh, where still waters reflect the softest hues of dawn and the only sound is the rhythmic call of the birds.

programme.title: Croatia's Plitvice Lakes - Europe's Natural Wonders Episode 2
programme.desc: Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes 🇭🇷 | Full 60-Minute 4K Nature Film ✨ Journey into one of the most magical landscapes on Earth — Plitvice Lakes National Park, Croatia’s crown jewel of cascading waterfalls, turquoise lakes, and lush alpine forests. This full-length 60-minute cinematic nature film invites you to relax and explore the mesmerizing beauty of Europe’s oldest and most breathtaking national park, filmed in stunning 4K Ultra HD. Follow the flow of crystal-clear water as it connects 16 terraced lakes through a labyrinth of waterfalls, travertine pools, and forest pathways — a symphony of nature captured in its purest form. 🎬 Presented by NatureStream.tv, creators of Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 1: Slovenia, this film is part of our global nature series designed to inspire calm, mindfulness, and appreciation for Earth’s beauty.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: And then there were two! Prepare for a roller coaster heads up battle as we bring you the conclusion of the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown. A starting field of 2010 entrants has narrowed to the final two. Players claimed their share of the $6.4 million dollar prize pool along the way, but our final two players hope to be crowned the ultimate victor, taking home the first place prize of $1 million dollars and having their name forever inscribed on the Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: From HyperX Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada it’s the WPT Choctaw Final Table where the final six players are competing for the top prize of $486,600 and the title of WPT Champion. Ray Qartomy and Chance Kornuth find themselves in familiar territory as this final table marks the fifth WPT final table appearance for Qartomy and the third for Kornuth. James Hundt Jr will compete at his first WPT final table alongside fan favorite Steve “Cuz” Buckner, poker pro Kristen Foxen, and James Mackey who won this very event in season 15.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: Four players remain in the battle for WPT Choctaw Champion. Steve “Cuz” Buckner is fired up and determined to find a way to win his first WPT Title. He is breaking out big bluffs backed by some big talk in hopes of outwitting his final three opponents. Tune in for more WPT Tournament action.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: The fight for first continues at HyperX Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada as our four remaining players hope to become a WPT Champion and leave with the first place prize of $486,600. An exciting spectacle so far, the WPT Choctaw final table has even more to offer. Don’t miss James Hundt, Ray Qartomy, Chance Kornuth, and Steve “Cuz” Buckner play for nearly half a million dollars with a WPT Title on the line.

programme.title: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Two players remain, but only one can claim the title of WPT Choctaw Champion. Both Chance Kornuth and Steve “Cuz” Buckner begin this heads up match with nearly even stacks in what promises to be an epic battle. The winner will receive $486,600 and their name forever engraved on the coveted Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup. Tune in to the crowning of a WPT Champion in this epic conclusion of the WPT Choctaw Main Event.

programme.title: Top Golf - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: We begin our second day of filming cash game action at Thunder Valley Casino Resort in Lincoln, CA, plus our players take a visit to a Top Golf facility to show off their driving chops. Featuring Matt Glantz, Tom Schneider, Kelly Winterhalter, Brad Garrett, Tony Bracy, Phil Hellmuth, and Harlan Karnofsky

programme.title: Way Down In The Valley - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: We conclude our epic cash game from Thunder Valley Casino in Lincoln, CA. Featuring Brad Garrett, Phil Hellmuth, Lee Markholt, Tom Schneider, Kelly Winterhalter, Tony Bracy, Rep Porter, and Jed Hoffman

programme.title: P.O.W. - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Phil Laak invents new poker terms during our first visit to Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Joe Cada, Maria Ho, Greg Mueller, Greg Merson, Phil Hellmuth, Bill Lee, Liv Boeree, and Phil Laak

programme.title: Heckmuth - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: We get some epic Hellmuth rants in this episode from Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Joe Cada, Maria Ho, Greg Mueller, Phil Hellmuth, Brandon Cantu, Bill Lee, Liv Boeree, and Phil Laak

programme.title: Angel and the Badman (1947)
programme.desc: A notorious outlaw is wounded in a shootout and finds himself nursed back to health by a compassionate Quaker family, leading him to question his violent past and choose between his old life as a gunslinger and the possibility of peace and love

programme.title: The Drifter (1932)
programme.desc: When a mysterious, soft-spoken stranger rides into a small town, he is drawn into a local conflict between ranchers and land-hungry villains, ultimately using his quick wits and hidden past to restore justice to the valley

programme.title: The Rifleman:S1 E1 - The Sharpshooter
programme.desc: In the series premiere, widower Lucas McCain and his young son Mark arrive in North Fork, New Mexico, seeking a fresh start. When a local dispute leads to a high-stakes marksmanship contest, Lucas's extraordinary skill with a custom Winchester rifle catches the attention of a local rancher, forcing him to choose between a quiet life and becoming a reluctant protector for the town

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1E4 - Lucas Helps The Town Drunk Sober Up
programme.desc: When a local alcoholic is falsely accused of a crime he did not commit, Lucas McCain steps in to defend him. Lucas works to help the man sober up and reclaim his dignity, ultimately aiding the local marshal in uncovering the truth and ensuring that justice is served for the town's downtrodden resident

programme.title: Straight Shooter 1939
programme.desc: An undercover federal agent investigates the mysterious death of an elderly man suspected of involvement in a major bank robbery. Posing as a drifter to infiltrate the local community, he must outsmart a ruthless gang also hunting for the missing loot while protecting the victim's niece

programme.title: Idaho
programme.desc: A deputy sets out to prove that a respected judge, who had once been a criminal, is being framed for crimes committed by a crooked saloon owner.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap 1943
programme.desc: In Raiders of Red Gap, the Range Busters ride into action when a ruthless gang plots to seize control of a frontier town. Crash Corrigan, Dusty King, and Alibi Terhune team up to outwit the outlaws with fast guns, daring stunts, and plenty of grit. With danger around every corner—and a touch of Alibi’s trademark humor—this action-packed Western gallops straight into classic Range Busters territory.

programme.title: Drum Taps 1933
programme.desc: In Drum Taps, cowboy star Ken Maynard rides into action when a vicious gang threatens to overrun the frontier. With his trusty horse Tarzan at his side, he rallies ranchers and townsfolk alike to stand against lawlessness. Packed with galloping chases, blazing six-guns, and Maynard’s trademark heroics, this early sound Western delivers classic thrills straight from the saddle.

programme.title: Utah 1945
programme.desc: Roy Rogers rides tall in Utah, a lively mix of song, romance, and Western action! When a city socialite inherits a sprawling ranch, she plans to sell it off—until Roy and the Sons of the Pioneers step in to show her the true value of life on the range. With scheming villains, sweeping landscapes, and plenty of toe-tapping tunes, this Roy Rogers classic proves that the West is as rich in heart as it is in land.

programme.title: Bells Of Rosarita
programme.desc: Sue Farnum inherits a circus, but her dead father's partner is trying to take it away from her. Roy and Bob Nolan are filming a movie on location at the circus. They and a number of other western movie stars come to Sue's aid, putting on a show and catching the bad guys.

programme.title: Maker Nation Challenge: Indigenous Artists Pay Tribute with Gorgeous Gorgets

programme.title: Bringing Down The House: The Bombing of Harvey's Casino
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, two men wheeled what looked like an IBM computer into a Lake Tahoe casino. The events that followed rocked the industry, baffled bomb technicians, and changed the lives of a criminal’s and a casino magnate’s family forever.
